title: Look yourself up on the platforms you've used
why: Old accounts, tags, and posts can carry a former name long after you've moved on — on profiles you forgot you had, or in other people's posts about you.
instructions: For each platform you've ever used (current or abandoned), search your name, former name, and old handles.
Check old usernames and email addresses you no longer use — accounts tied to them may still be public.
Note any profile, tag, or post that shows your former name. Hardening and removal come in Phase 2.
deadnamePrompts: Do any old usernames contain your former name?
Are you tagged under a former name in someone else's photos or posts?
